def negative_public_any_type_leak():
    rule_id = "public_any_type_leak"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Public functions or model fields that expose Any, object, or similarly wide contracts."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
